privileged_info_summary: The manage_shared_corporate_contact task operates on synthetic EPCRA Tier II data in CAMEO Data Manager 4.5.1 running on Windows. The task requires creating two synthetic facilities: 'AquaPure North Plant' (100 River Road, Springfield, IL 62702) and 'AquaPure South Plant' (4500 Industrial Way, Springfield, IL 62703). A single synthetic emergency contact 'Elena Rodriguez' must be created once and linked to both facilities as a Title III Emergency Contact. Contact information includes work phone 217-555-0199 (using reserved 555 fictional exchange) and 24-hour phone 800-555-9988. Springfield ZIP codes 62702 and 62703 are valid real locations in Illinois. All phone numbers use reserved fictional 555 exchange confirming synthetic data. The critical requirement is creating exactly ONE contact record and linking it to BOTH facilities to ensure data consistency.
